__flat__.adminPlanGrantAlreadyActive: The same plan is already active for this user.
__flat__.adminPlanGrantProviderManagedConflict: The user already has an active payment-provider-managed subscription. Manual package grants are not supported until the current subscription expires.
__flat__.adminPlanGrantRoleUnsupported: Only teacher or operator users can receive manual credit or package grants.
__flat__.campaignLockedAfterHit: This package campaign already has paid hit orders. Campaign products and benefit rules can no longer be changed.
__flat__.campaignOverlapActive: Products {product_names} already have an active package campaign in the selected time range. Adjust the campaign window or choose different products.
__flat__.creditInsufficient: Insufficient credits. Subscribe or buy credits before continuing.
__flat__.customDomainDisabled: Custom domains are not enabled for this teacher.
__flat__.debugDisabledBySoftLimit: Credits are below the configured reminder threshold. Subscribe or buy credits before continuing debug previews.
__flat__.domainBindingNotFound: The requested custom domain binding was not found.
__flat__.domainHostConflict: This custom domain is already bound by another teacher.
__flat__.referralRewardProductMismatch: Referral reward package configuration does not match the billing product. Contact an administrator to review the campaign setup.
__flat__.subscriptionInactive: An active subscription is required. Credit pack credits can only be purchased or used within the subscription period.
__flat__.subscriptionPreorderAlreadyExists: A package preorder is already pending for this subscription.
__flat__.subscriptionPreorderProviderUnsupported: Package preorder is currently supported only for self-managed payment channels.
__flat__.subscriptionPreorderTargetInvalid: Package preorder only supports renewing the same package or switching to a lower-tier package at the cycle boundary.
__flat__.subscriptionPreorderUnavailable: Package preorder is unavailable for the current subscription.
__flat__.subscriptionUpgradeAmountInvalid: This upgrade cannot be completed because the payable amount is not positive after preorder offset. Please contact support to adjust the package pricing.
__flat__.subscriptionUpgradeOnly: The current subscription is still active. Only upgrades to a higher-tier plan are allowed.
